profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Multi Medika Internasional Tbk engages in the wholesale of laboratory, pharmaceutical, and medical equipment in Indonesia. It is involved in the property leasing; wholesale of agricultural food and beverages, livestock and fishery food and beverages, non-alcoholic and non-diary beverages, textile goods, cosmetics, and other household goods and equipment; management consulting; courier agency activities; web portals; travel, conferences, and exhibitions; and meeting and event organizer services. The company was founded in 2020 and is based in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia. PT Multi Medika Internasional Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Multi Inti Usaha.
